name: Fumakilla Limited
summary: Fumakilla Limited manufactures, sells, imports, and exports insecticidal, household, gardening, business, and other products worldwide. The company offers insecticides; garden supplies, including fungicides, herbicides, fertilizers, potting soil, pest control agents, and other horticultural products; and household goods, such as pollen, house dust measure, insect repellent, dehumidifier, and other home care products. It also provides pest control products for stores, factories, and restaurants for business and industry uses. The company was formerly known as Oshimo Kaishundo and changed its name to Fumakilla Limited in 1962. Fumakilla Limited was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
